title: oxybasis rubra var. humilis
intro: Oxybasis rubra var. humilis, also known as red goosefoot or red fat hen, is a plant species within the Chenopodiaceae family, characterized by its low-growing, spreading habit and reddish stems. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Oxybasis rubra var. humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is traditionally employed to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
